hero.question: LoL: KT Rolster vs Nongshim Red Force - Game 1 Winner
hero.prob_take: KT Rolster at 78.5% has baked in a 4-1 series favorite status, which tracks with their LCK pedigree but ignores that Nongshim just beat T1 in playoffs and is riding a hot meta read. The 14.5-point spike suggests late money chasing narrative rather than new intel, which usually means sharp bettors are fading the move.

daily_take.headline: KT Rolster's 14-point spike signals overconfident money piling in
daily_take.deck: KT jumped 14.5 points to 78.5% in 24 hours on $499K volume, but the move smells like recreational cash chasing narrative rather than sharp analysis. Nongshim has shown up in playoffs before. At nearly 4-to-1 odds, KT is priced like a lock. Smart money should ask why this game matters enough to move that much, then fade accordingly.
